programme.desc: Nick and Kate investigate possible arson attacks on barns in the area, while a wandering horse and a stray salmon add to the problems in Aidensfield. Rural drama, starring Nick Berry and Bill Maynard

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Tricia regrets her night of passion with Terry, Alice returns to Emmerdale, Bernice is intrigued when she receives some flowers, and the strain gets too much for Kathy

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Betty worries about Kathy's state of mind, Terry ruins Kelly's 18th birthday party, and Eric asks Ashley to hold a toy antiques fair at the village hall

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fred panics as no one will enter the shop due to the smell. Deirdre tells everyone she is marrying Jon, and Jim accuses Steve of ripping him off

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Deirdre is amazed when Jon gives her a gold credit card. Les is furious to see Leanne has a bruised face, and Fred discovers the source of the mysterious smell

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: When a member of Oxford University's examinations board is found dead, Morse deduces he must have overheard a conversation someone wanted to keep secret at all costs. However, his theory has one major flaw - the victim was deaf. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Barbara Flynn, Michael Gough, Clive Swift, Roger Lloyd Pack and Frederick Treves

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A philandering husband is found dying by the swimming pool after being shot during a house party at the home of Lady Lucy Angkatell. Legendary Belgian Sleuth Poirot, who is guest of honour at the gathering, appears to have an open-and-shut case on his hands - but the investigator finds himself up against one of his finest adversaries. Whodunit, guest-starring Sarah Miles (Ryan's Daughter), with David Suchet, Lysette Anthony and Edward Fox

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: A royal visit to a family owned munitions factory puts a spring in the step of Chief Superintendent Bright, but Morse is still stuck on general duties and excluded from the event. However, when an unpopular worker is found murdered in a secluded area of the shop floor, the detective finds himself drawn into the affairs of the company and its dysfunctional owners. The prime suspect is a colleague who had fallen out with the victim over an industrial accident, and Bright is eager for the investigation to be carried out as quickly and quietly as possible, but Endeavour is not convinced the case can be solved so easily. Shaun Evans stars, with Martin Jarvis, Jenny Seagrove and Craig Parkinson

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective begins to suspect something is amiss when he visits one of his favoured haunts in London for dinner and discovers a fellow regular has dramatically changed his diet. Down in Brighton, elderly Anthony Gascoigne lies dying while his estranged twin brother Henry falls to his death - but nobody is sure whether the man was deliberately pushed. Bizarrely, the key to the riddle seems to lie in a blackberry pie. David Suchet stars in the title role, with Philip Jackson, Hugh Fraser and Pauline Moran

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Part two of two. Despite arresting four people, the detectives face a wall of silence in their investigation into the grisly murders - but they eventually make a breakthrough, which doesn't quite give them the answers they were expecting. On the domestic front, Rachel wakes up in bed with charismatic colleague Sean - a mistake she is keen never to repeat - and Janet wants to keep her newly single status a secret

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Grizzled copper Jack Frost teams up with an obnoxious, chain-smoking colleague to investigate a seemingly straightforward hit-and-run incident that proves to have devastating repercussions for the victim's family and their peaceful rural community. David Jason, Bruce Alexander and Philip Jackson star

programme.desc: Jack presses Alec for information about his dating agency. Maud admits to Ashley that she planted the fish in the shop, and Judy is horrified when Zoe visits her

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Judy refuses to talk to Zoe and panics. Leanne encourages Zoe to fight for her rights, and Fred tells Ashley that he wants him to manage the shop

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford detective investigates a murder in the vicinity of a quiet country church, whose previous vicar committed suicide. As the case proceeds, he uncovers a sinister nest of evil-doing. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Michael Hordern, Angela Morant and Maurice O'Connell

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth finds himself in interesting company as English socialites and American millionaires rub shoulders on board a train bound for the French Riviera. Passengers include oil magnate Rufus Van Aldin (Elliott Gould) and his daughter Ruth (Jaime Murray) - to whom he has given a magnificent ruby known as the Heart of Fire. With members of the aristocracy crammed into a confined space with their husbands, lovers and a renowned gemstone, murder cannot be far away. With Lindsay Duncan, Roger Lloyd Pack and James D'Arcy

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A visiting American academic delivers a controversial speech, with many audience members worried his ideas could be used to target ethnic minorities. So when he is found hanged the next morning and Dr Hobson quickly discounts suicide, Lewis and Hathaway realise they have many suspects - from the local anti-racism activist who was first in voicing her disgust at the professor's beliefs to the women who had bombarded him with threatening e-mails. But then another body turns up and the case takes on a new dimension. David Soul and Patrick Baladi guest star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: After enjoying a trip to the theatre with Captain Hastings, the detective is disturbed by the sound of gunshots in an apartment at Whitehaven Mansions, and soon finds himself investigating a murder. Drama, starring David Suchet, Hugh Fraser and Philip Jackson

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: It's Murray and Bailey this week, as Rachel travels to Bristol with the DCI, who is advising on a rape and murder case that bears similarities to one she worked on 13 years previously involving the deaths of four women. Back at home, meanwhile, the detective discovers her brother Dom has been prostituting himself in her flat - and also learns the charges against her ex-boyfriend Nick are being dropped

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack is asked to investigate the theft of a car belonging to a friend of Mullett, but misjudges the grizzled Superintendent's capacity for tact and diplomacy and it is not long before he is taken off the case. Things take a shocking turn when the car finally turns up - with the body of a drug dealer in the boot. Detective drama, starring David Jason, with Melanie Thaw and Bruce Alexander

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fiona is desperate to get away but worries about the salon. Deirdre fears she went too far in proposing to Jon. Liz is upset to discover Andy has left because of Jim

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maud discovers Fred is trying to con her into selling the shop to him. Jon panics when he and Deirdre are photographed together by the press

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris and Steve team up to frame Kim over the phone call. Roy returns from London with a black eye. Terry confesses his feelings for Tricia

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris gives Spalding the information about Kim's phone bill. Terry refuses to listen to Tricia's apology. Man-hungry Bernice chats up Paddy and Ashley

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick pursues a moorland flasher and drunken hikers, while Kate suffers abuse at the hands of a bullying husband. Rural drama, starring Nick Berry

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid gets in a flap when he learns his employer is planning to visit him at home. Family comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy takes over Robin's poker game when he is rushed into hospital. Unfortunately, she does not fully understand the rules and puts the rent money at risk. Comedy, with Paula Wilcox and Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A young woman asks Poirot to investigate her father's murder - a 14-year-old crime for which her mother was found guilty and executed. The detective agrees to investigate, but warns his client that he may discover things she does not want to hear. David Suchet stars, with Rachael Stirling, Aidan Gillen, Aimee Mullens, Toby Stephens, Gemma Jones, Patrick Malahide and Annette Badland

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Tragedy casts a dark shadow over the idyllic landscape of Aidensfield when Nick receives an anonymous tip-off about a local shopkeeper's unsavoury antics. Meanwhile, Greengrass finds himself in trouble courtesy of the village gossip-mongers. Sixties-based rural drama, starring Nick Berry and Bill Maynard

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim spends the night behind bars, Kelly and Tricia persuade Turner to host Kelly's birthday party, and Terry agrees to move back into the Woolpack

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe pays Kim's bail money despite Chris's objection, Bernice makes a play for Biff, and Kathy is determined to bring Alice back and resume normal life

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken is disgusted when he finds out Alec's plan. During an argument, Nick reveals to Gail the Mallets' deal with Zoe over the baby

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gail accuses Leanne of spreading lies about the Malletts. Ken reluctantly agrees to join Alec's escort agency, and Jon surprises Deirdre by asking her to marry him

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the popular crime drama, starring John Thaw as author Colin Dexter's Oxford detective who treats his cases as intellectual challenges. In this mystery, Morse is introduced to trusty Sergeant Lewis (Kevin Whately) and takes it upon himself to investigate the apparent suicide of a lady friend. Co-starring Gemma Jones, Patrick Troughton, James Grout and Peter Woodthorpe

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective's friend Sir Charles Cartwright (guest star Martin Shaw) hosts a cocktail party at his home in Cornwall, where an amiable local priest chokes to death on his drink. There seems to be no motive for murder, and no trace of poison found in the victim's glass, but weeks later, when Sir Charles's doctor friend Sir Bartholomew Strange dies in similar circumstances, he and Poirot team up to investigate. Drama, with Art Malik, Jane Asher and Anna Carteret, and David Suchet in the title role

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A disused abbey that is believed to be cursed is about to be turned into a pub, a decision that has angered many superstitious locals - not to mention the real ale society. The day after the launch night, the curse appears to have claimed a victim - a body is found boiled to death in a kettle of beer, in a manner very similar to an infamous execution on the site in the 16th century. Elaine Paige guest stars, while Annette Badland joins the cast as new pathologist Fleur Perkins

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: English country squire Marcus Waverly receives a series of anonymous letters threatening to kidnap his son Johnnie, but the case is dismissed by Scotland Yard - prompting Poirot to open his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet and Geoffrey Bateman

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Part one of two. The badly burned body of a disabled man turns up in a remote part of Manchester and a few days later another corpse is discovered. The detectives start to realise the victims were not just murdered, but tortured too. They make an arrest, but it becomes clear their investigation has just scratched the surface. Meanwhile, Janet throws her husband out and Rachel's estranged brother turns up on her doorstep. With Lisa Riley and Pippa Haywood

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The severed arm of a missing environmental health inspector is washed up on the shores of the Humber and Frost's investigation leads him to a local meat factory. Unfortunately, his new lodger's annoying dog keeps distracting him from the case. Starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, Emma Kay, Niall O'Brien and Tom Georgeson

programme.title: Bless This House

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy and Robin borrow Mr Roper's car to drive to Southampton for a football match. However, the vehicle has similar qualities to its unreliable owner and soon breaks down leaving the duo having to summon help from an unexpected quarter. Comedy, with Richard O'Sullivan and Paula Wilcox

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective's friend Sir Charles Cartwright (guest star Martin Shaw) hosts a cocktail party at his home in Cornwall, where an amiable local priest chokes to death on his drink. There seems to be no motive for murder, and no trace of poison found in the victim's glass, but weeks later, when Sir Charles's doctor friend Sir Bartholomew Strange dies in similar circumstances, he and Poirot team up to investigate. Drama, with Art Malik, Jane Asher and Anna Carteret, and David Suchet in the title role

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick and Kate investigate possible arson attacks on barns in the area, while a wandering horse and a stray salmon add to the problems in Aidensfield. Rural drama, starring Nick Berry and Bill Maynard

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Tricia regrets her night of passion with Terry, Alice returns to Emmerdale, Bernice is intrigued when she receives some flowers, and the strain gets too much for Kathy

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Betty worries about Kathy's state of mind, Terry ruins Kelly's 18th birthday party, and Eric asks Ashley to hold a toy antiques fair at the village hall

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fred panics as no one will enter the shop due to the smell. Deirdre tells everyone she is marrying Jon, and Jim accuses Steve of ripping him off

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Deirdre is amazed when Jon gives her a gold credit card. Les is furious to see Leanne has a bruised face, and Fred discovers the source of the mysterious smell

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: When a member of Oxford University's examinations board is found dead, Morse deduces he must have overheard a conversation someone wanted to keep secret at all costs. However, his theory has one major flaw - the victim was deaf. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Barbara Flynn, Michael Gough, Clive Swift, Roger Lloyd Pack and Frederick Treves

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A philandering husband is found dying by the swimming pool after being shot during a house party at the home of Lady Lucy Angkatell. Legendary Belgian Sleuth Poirot, who is guest of honour at the gathering, appears to have an open-and-shut case on his hands - but the investigator finds himself up against one of his finest adversaries. Whodunit, guest-starring Sarah Miles (Ryan's Daughter), with David Suchet, Lysette Anthony and Edward Fox

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: A royal visit to a family owned munitions factory puts a spring in the step of Chief Superintendent Bright, but Morse is still stuck on general duties and excluded from the event. However, when an unpopular worker is found murdered in a secluded area of the shop floor, the detective finds himself drawn into the affairs of the company and its dysfunctional owners. The prime suspect is a colleague who had fallen out with the victim over an industrial accident, and Bright is eager for the investigation to be carried out as quickly and quietly as possible, but Endeavour is not convinced the case can be solved so easily. Shaun Evans stars, with Martin Jarvis, Jenny Seagrove and Craig Parkinson

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective begins to suspect something is amiss when he visits one of his favoured haunts in London for dinner and discovers a fellow regular has dramatically changed his diet. Down in Brighton, elderly Anthony Gascoigne lies dying while his estranged twin brother Henry falls to his death - but nobody is sure whether the man was deliberately pushed. Bizarrely, the key to the riddle seems to lie in a blackberry pie. David Suchet stars in the title role, with Philip Jackson, Hugh Fraser and Pauline Moran

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Part two of two. Despite arresting four people, the detectives face a wall of silence in their investigation into the grisly murders - but they eventually make a breakthrough, which doesn't quite give them the answers they were expecting. On the domestic front, Rachel wakes up in bed with charismatic colleague Sean - a mistake she is keen never to repeat - and Janet wants to keep her newly single status a secret

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Grizzled copper Jack Frost teams up with an obnoxious, chain-smoking colleague to investigate a seemingly straightforward hit-and-run incident that proves to have devastating repercussions for the victim's family and their peaceful rural community. David Jason, Bruce Alexander and Philip Jackson star

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar investigates allegations that the Loch Ness monster not only exists, but is also responsible for a mysterious spate of killings in Scotland. Fulton Mackay guest stars alongside Roger Moore

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A Scottish detective on the trail of a gang of crooks requests help, and the squad resolves to catch his quarry. However, it becomes apparent that the visiting sleuth is holding back some important information that Regan and his colleagues need to know. TV presenter Janet Ellis features in a supporting role

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: With King on holiday, Steed and aristocratic adventurer Lady Diana investigate a sinister factory housing a deadly computer that seems to be behind the murders of several British agents. Patrick Macnee and Jennifer Croxton star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur purchases a consignment of satellite dishes, enlisting the aid of a former television repair man to fit them. However, his contractor proves to be afraid of heights. Meanwhile, Ray develops an interest in the daughter of volatile Italian businessman 'Fingers' Rosetti. Pete Postlethwaite guest stars, with George Cole and Gary Webster

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes at British brands, including creating the soles of Dr Marten's, and making Wagon Wheels. Narrated by Jimmy Nail

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A governess is accused of shooting dead her millionaire employer's wife on a remote bridge - but Holmes' deductive powers suggest an alternative explanation to the mystery. Period detective drama, guest starring Daniel Massey, with Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar is asked to take a diamond to Amsterdam for recutting - but crooks are determined to get their hands on it by any means necessary. Classic adventure, guest starring TP McKenna and Terence Rigby

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter track down those responsible for killing a driver and injuring a policeman while making off with vehicles carrying brandy on two separate occasions. Carter's new girlfriend, rookie cop Julie Kingdom, pursues a known fence and recovers the brandy. However, when Regan wants to take the credit, he and Carter come to blows. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed is knocked out by gas while pursuing rogue agent Jimmy Merlin (Peter Barkworth). When he awakes London is deserted and under martial law, imposed by the embittered Brigadier Hansing (Joss Ackland), who has explosive plans. Patrick Macnee and Linda Thorson star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A business deal backfires badly, leaving the future of the Winchester in doubt, so Ray organises a fundraising football match against the police. However, with kick-off looming, one of Arthur's incompetent associates appears with a huge sum of money stolen from a rival businessman, leaving the the dodgy dealer seeking a way to stash the cash without it being noticed. George Cole and Gary Webster star

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: How Maldon sea salt is made using traditional methods on the shores of the Blackwater in Essex, and behind the scenes at the Brompton bike factory in London. Narrated by Jimmy Nail

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a team of five family members answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money. Subjects in this episode include the Winter Olympics, Tudor monarchs and the US

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Embarrassing Bodies presenter Christian Jessen, JB Gill of JLS, comedian Helen Lederer and former professional snooker player Stephen Hendry pit their wits against the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for their charity of choice. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Collateral Damage (2002)
programme.desc: A heroic firefighter is plunged into the world of international terrorism when his wife and child are killed in a horrific attack. Disillusioned with the progress of the official investigation, he decides to take on the villains himself and heads for Colombia on a dangerous mission of revenge, determined to bring the perpetrators to justice. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Francesca Neri, Elias Koteas and Cliff Curtis

Meanwhile, Murtaugh finds a joint stashed in his kitchen that he brings to Scorsese for testing in an effort to bust one of his children. Clayne Crawford and Damon Wayans star

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A racehorse trainer asks Holmes to investigate the mysterious disappearance of one of his cash-strapped employer's many creditors. Victorian whodunit, starring Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke, with a young Jude Law in an early supporting role

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar investigates the murder of a journalist friend, following a trail of clues that leads to a cult obsessed with the splendour and savagery of ancient Rome. Drama, guest starring Peter Wyngarde and Ed Bishop

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A member of a group of convicts slips off the roof and dies during a robbery. The apparent leader of the gang appears to be having doubts about his life and Regan senses he is deliberately pointing clues in a desire to be caught during his next job. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed helps Scotland Yard colleague Arthur Doyle on a murder inquiry with an abundance of clues, each one pointing to an illustrious suspect. However, all the clues prove fakes left behind by a blackmailer who is planting them to incriminate wealthy men as part of an extortion racket. Kenneth Cope guest stars

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur finds it increasingly hard to sell his dodgy second-hand cars and decides it might be more profitable to rent them out instead. However, panic ensues when his beloved Bentley is stolen. Meanwhile, Ray faces the possibility that his new girlfriend is involved with a gang of burglars. Drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster

programme.title: Made in Britain

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: How traditional seaside rock is made, a process that has not changed since Victorian times. Plus, how a new fire extinguisher is saving lives around the world. Jimmy Nail narrates

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A desperate girl contacts Holmes and asks him to clear her boyfriend of killing his father, a farmer found bludgeoned to death beside a lake. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett , Peter Vaughan and James Purefoy

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar is suspected of involvement in a series of jewel robberies on the French Riviera, and has to stay one step ahead of the police long enough to catch the real culprit. Guest starring Ronnie Barker and Aimee Delamain

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A bad dream has Regan's girlfriend fearing for his safety, and her visions ring true when he gets involved in a case involving a stolen lorryload of cigars. The plot thickens when illicit cocaine is retrieved and arms stolen from the US are discovered to be on their way to a military faction in Ireland. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Tara King finds herself the subject of an all too welcoming holiday resort with a 'no check-out' policy for some of their guests in this comedic parody of Patrick McGoohan's iconic series The Prisoner. Linda Thorson stars

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Australian private investigator Bill McCabe approaches Arthur and tells him he is the possible heir of Joshua Daley, who died intestate in Woolomoroo. Believing kinship has been proved, the dodgy dealer prepares to fly Down Under to claim what appears to be rightfully his. George Cole stars

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Jimmy Nail narrates a look inside a firework factory, before a lesson in pork pies in Melton Mowbray. Plus, how respective experts create fishing rods and single malt whisky

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a team of five called Young's Offenders answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge. Then they try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Heptathlete Louise Hazel, comedian Joel Dommett, 1980s music star Sinitta and actor Les Dennis team up to take part in the quiz show, in which they must answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit - all without being caught out by the 'quiz genius' Chaser. Presented by Bradley Walsh

programme.title: Taken 2 (2012)
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Bryan Mills and his ex-wife Lenore are taken hostage in Istanbul by an Albanian gangster, whose son Bryan killed while bringing down a kidnapping ring. He is able to escape with the aid of his daughter, and together they fight to rescue Lenore and wipe out the criminal family. Action thriller sequel, starring Liam Neeson, Maggie Grace and Famke Janssen

programme.title: Ransom (1996)
programme.desc: An airline tycoon is wary of involving the police when his nine-year-old son is abducted, but co-operates with their plan to make a ransom drop. Thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Rene Russo, Gary Sinise, Delroy Lindo and Liev Schreiber

programme.title: The Saint

programme.title: The Sweeney

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: With King on holiday, Steed and aristocratic adventurer Lady Diana investigate a sinister factory housing a deadly computer that seems to be behind the murders of several British agents. Patrick Macnee and Jennifer Croxton star

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes at British brands, including creating the soles of Dr Marten's, and making Wagon Wheels. Narrated by Jimmy Nail

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A governess is accused of shooting dead her millionaire employer's wife on a remote bridge - but Holmes' deductive powers suggest an alternative explanation to the mystery. Period detective drama, guest starring Daniel Massey, with Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar is asked to take a diamond to Amsterdam for recutting - but crooks are determined to get their hands on it by any means necessary. Classic adventure, guest starring TP McKenna and Terence Rigby

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter track down those responsible for killing a driver and injuring a policeman while making off with vehicles carrying brandy on two separate occasions. Carter's new girlfriend, rookie cop Julie Kingdom, pursues a known fence and recovers the brandy. However, when Regan wants to take the credit, he and Carter come to blows. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed is knocked out by gas while pursuing rogue agent Jimmy Merlin (Peter Barkworth). When he awakes London is deserted and under martial law, imposed by the embittered Brigadier Hansing (Joss Ackland), who has explosive plans. Patrick Macnee and Linda Thorson star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A business deal backfires badly, leaving the future of the Winchester in doubt, so Ray organises a fundraising football match against the police. However, with kick-off looming, one of Arthur's incompetent associates appears with a huge sum of money stolen from a rival businessman, leaving the the dodgy dealer seeking a way to stash the cash without it being noticed. George Cole and Gary Webster star

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: How Maldon sea salt is made using traditional methods on the shores of the Blackwater in Essex, and behind the scenes at the Brompton bike factory in London. Narrated by Jimmy Nail

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a team of five family members answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money. Subjects in this episode include the Winter Olympics, Tudor monarchs and the US

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Embarrassing Bodies presenter Christian Jessen, JB Gill of JLS, comedian Helen Lederer and former professional snooker player Stephen Hendry pit their wits against the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for their charity of choice. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Collateral Damage (2002)
programme.desc: A heroic firefighter is plunged into the world of international terrorism when his wife and child are killed in a horrific attack. Disillusioned with the progress of the official investigation, he decides to take on the villains himself and heads for Colombia on a dangerous mission of revenge, determined to bring the perpetrators to justice. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Francesca Neri, Elias Koteas and Cliff Curtis

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Atlanta, Georgia, in an attempt to save a family-run smokehouse restaurant plagued by mismanagement and lazy cooking. Michon's owner, Al Wilson, had always hoped he could pass his beloved business on to daughter Natalie, but when he suffered a collapsed lung the handover came about much earlier than expected. Now it's down to Gordon to motivate Natalie and save Michon's from disaster

programme.title: Lose a Stone in 21 Days with Michael Mosley
programme.desc: Dr Michael Mosley reunites five volunteers, whose health he helped transform in Lose a Stone in 21 Days with Michael Mosley, in a bid to myth-bust some of the common misconceptions around healthy weight management. Using cutting-edge tests and technology to illustrate that the calories our volunteers actually need day to day, could be different to the NHS's recommended daily amounts, the show investigates whether weight loss inevitably leads to putting weight back on again, and explores whether exercise is as helpful as we think. There is also bespoke advice to each volunteer on how to achieve a healthy weight for the long term

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George meets communications manager Ellie, who has realised her dream of a life on the road by buying a 1970s double-decker bus and turning it into a luxury mobile home. He also follows the creation of a multi-purpose super den in Suffolk, complete with a floor that turns into a roof terrace, visits a shrimp-shaped concrete structure in Japan, and heads to Kew Gardens in search of inspiration for his treehouse project

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It's the quarter-final, and the remaining potters face a challenge inspired by Native American Acoma pottery that involves firing their pots in cow dung. programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The traditional battle between the Old Towne Tavern and Cheers takes a new turn when the former comes under new management. The regulars feel they may have underestimated the opposition when they discover the nickname of the new owner - The Angel of Death. Harry Guardino guest stars alongside Ted Danson

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug meets his parents at the airport where they urge him to sign their will - which includes a clause stating that he is responsible for turning off their life support. He is horrified at the thought, but Stephanie is just jealous that her brother is the favourite yet again

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie meet their neighbours after their backyards are destroyed by a hurricane. Carrie disapproves of their idea of combining the gardens when they rebuild - until the couple next door build a pool. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Cranes take a trip in the Winnebago on New Year's Eve to celebrate the turn of the new millennium, but a case of mistaken identity leaves Frasier and Martin trying to rescue Niles from another family's van

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink pulls out all the stops to compose a new theme tune for his radio show - but fails to appreciate what is required. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink is delighted to land a date with a former prom queen, but soon learns the hard way that beauty is only skin deep. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words and numbers game in which contestants pit their wits against the clock. Tanni Grey-Thompson joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Catching up with the owners of a Spanish riding centre who were struggling to break even. Plus, two glampsite owners in France take drastic action when their business closes

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition continues as Linda Milner and her friend Lany welcome their guests to Bay House in Scarborough for a socially-distanced stay

programme.title: Drawers Off
programme.desc: Glyn attempts to tone down the Gothic elements of his signature style, while Sara is back behind the easel following her turn as model

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart goes to work in a burlesque theatre and proves a big hit with its clientele - until Marge turns up with an angry mob in tow and urges them to demolish the place

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back to some of their favourite properties from the show and offers tips and tricks to help viewers make the best of their homes. As well as catching up with some of the families that previously featured, Kirstie and Phil focus on the layout issues and dilemmas that many of us now face in a very different world. In this episode, the pair look back at families who wanted to extend their properties and revolutionise the layout of their homes

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: The presenter explores the UK's wildest, most remote and beautifully designed holiday homes, accompanied by some of the nation's most fascinating and funny women. In the final episode, Sandi is joined by her close friend and The Great British Bake Off judge Prue Leith to explore some of the best staycations in the Cotswolds. The pair visit a luxury tree house, a striking home made from glass, and colourful and chic home designed by Kate Moss

programme.title: The Pandemic at No 47
programme.desc: Marking the anniversary of the first national lockdown, director Paddy Wivell films the effect that this prolonged period of isolation has had on his own community. With restrictions in place that limit social contact, Paddy films the diverse mix of London residents at a distance, through their doorways and windows, and neighbours and people in his community who were once strangers reveal their fears and anxieties, as well as stories of hope, during these unprecedented times

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 21-year-old patient is brought in with a suspected stroke, which the consultant finds concerning for someone so young. A patient in urgent care is treated for a cut on his leg, and a man breaks his leg after being thrown from his bike. As the patients undergo treatment, they and their families reflect on the role relationships between parent and child have played in their lives

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Philadelphia to help failing Mexican restaurant Zocalo. Owners Greg and Mary Russell met and fell in love while they were working there, and the place held such sentimental importance to them they pooled their money and bought it. Now Gordon tries to turn things around before the floundering business ruins their marriage and tears their family apart

programme.title: Dark Night (2016)
programme.desc: Six strangers leading seemingly directionless lives attend a screening of an eagerly awaited new movie, only to find themselves caught up in a massacre when a gunman opens fire on the cinema. Drama inspired by the 2012 Aurora shootings, starring Anna Rose Hopkins and Robert Jumper

programme.title: The Handmaid's Tale
programme.desc: Offred reflects on her relationship with her mother as she navigates her way through Gilead. In Little America, Moira tries to cope with the trauma she endured

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Filmed over four months, this edition of the programme gives a unique perspective on life on the NHS frontline. Dr Saleyha Ahsan filmed her own journey through the second wave of the Covid-19 pandemic, capturing the pressure and personal tragedies she faced with the surge in patients, which included her own father. This special Dispatches film also shows the emotional and physical burden faced by friends and colleagues, and how they came close to breaking point with the psychological toll of fighting to keep people alive

programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.desc: India v England. Rishi Persad presents coverage of day one of the series-concluding Fourth Test, held at Sardar Patel Stadium in Ahmedabad. With analysis from Alastair Cook

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Luxury Holidays: How to Get Away This Year
programme.desc: Sabrina Grant investigates whether a proper break in 2021 is possible, and where keen holiday-makers can visit once restrictions are lifted. She meets families who are desperate for an escape and explores the options for taking a luxury trip both at home and abroad - from high-end British destinations that are off the beaten track, to cruises and foreign countries that may be open to tourists later in the year

programme.title: Stand Up & Deliver
programme.desc: Part two of two. With just 24 hours to go until their comedy debut, the celebrities get some last-minute tips from their mentors. Judi Love coaches Curtis Pritchard in improvisation, Nick Helm teaches Sayeeda Warsi how to make a strong first impression, and Jason Manford is still struggling to get Shaun Ryder to remember his act. Meanwhile, Katie McGlynn tries to harness her nerves and Richard Coles remains reverent when mentor David Baddiel pushes on him a joke with two swear words in the same sentence

programme.title: The Big Fat Quiz of Everything
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig, Joe Lycett, Katherine Ryan, Big Narstie, David Baddiel and Frank Skinner join quizmaster Jimmy Carr as he poses questions from the last 100,000 years of human history, giving a unique Big Fat Quiz spin on subjects such as history, music, film, TV and science from every epoch. As always, Jimmy is helped by a whole host of celebrity question-setters, including newsreader Jon Snow and actor Charles Dance

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: It's finally happening - Adam is bringing a girl home for dinner, and Mum immediately takes a shine to twentysomething Emma, who's definitely marriage material. But just as things start going smoothly for the young couple, the evening takes a turn for the worse with the arrival of eight-year-old Katie, who has a crush on Adam - much to Jonny's delight. Robert Popper's award-winning comedy starring Simon Bird, Paul Ritter, Tamsin Greig, Tom Rosenthal, Sophia Di Martino and Honor Kneafsey

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Continuing the third series of Robert Popper's award-winning comedy about the Goodmans' family gatherings. Dad has been secretly hiding a dead fox in the outside freezer as he wants to get it stuffed, but when Mum almost finds out, he enlists the help of Adam and Jonny to stash the carcass elsewhere. Tracy-Ann Oberman (best known for her role as Chrissie Watts in EastEnders) makes her third appearance as Aunty Val, starring alongside Simon Bird, Paul Ritter, Tamsin Greig, Tom Rosenthal and Mark Heap

With a budget of £14,000 to renovate a derelict house that has been empty for more than 30 years, they expect to move into their new home within four months. If they miss their deadline, they face spending Christmas in a caravan

programme.title: Killer and Kidnapper: My Father (2018)
programme.desc: A maths tutor finds a way to reconnect with her abducted daughter, but the girl's father will do anything, even kill, to keep the truth hidden. Thriller, starring Jessica Barth and Dylan Bruno

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Jane sails around South America in style aboard an ultra-luxury ship. Starting in Valparaíso, she embraces her inner Banksy on a street art tour, before beginning her journey south along the Chilean coast. A few days later she reaches the breathtaking glacier on Laguna San Rafael. Here, Jane partakes in the customary and traditional drinking of whisky on ice directly from the glacier. She then ventures further south into deepest Patagonia, stopping off in Punta Arenas. Back on board the ship, Jane enjoys a tour of the bridge with the captain as they make their way to the Falklands

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: The medics explore the theory that a 'broken heart' can cause patients to suffer very real mental and physical problems. Dr Wyne chats to Adolphus, who is struggling to come to terms with the recent death of his wife and best friend within a few weeks of each other. Dr Qamar pays a home visit to Elsie, a sprightly octogenarian whose health has deteriorated since the death of her husband, while Dr Razak treats young Emily, who has inherited a rare genetic condition from her late father which weakens the muscles of the heart

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: A professional dog walker finds her Afghan hound is beyond even her control, and pulls her over so badly that she has ended up with a broken leg. Graeme Hall comes to her aid, helping her to become more confident in dealing with the determined dog. Other clients include a rescue dog who has been sent back by countless owners and a spaniel who is obsessed with chasing her own shadow

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben meets a family that has created a new home in the Devon countryside - but having had to fight to be allowed to build on the land, they now find peace hard to adjust to. Nevertheless, they continue in their drive to be as self-sufficient as possible. However, Ben spots a new development in their lives that could present them with their next big challenge

programme.title: Everest: Conquering the Death Zone
programme.desc: The stories of mountaineers who have reached the summit of the world's tallest mountain, including a look at the dangers of the low oxygen levels at high altitudes. The programme examines the factors that allowed Edmund Hillary and Tenzing Norgay's 1953 expedition to succeed where so many had failed, and reveals how the Sherpas, who work as porters and guides for expeditions, have a physiology uniquely adapted to surviving at high altitudes

programme.title: Snowtrapped: Can't Get Out!
programme.desc: From avalanches to in-car burials, this documentary tells seven stories of people who became trapped by snow. Real-life footage brings to life how some survived against both the odds and the elements, how some were found despite having no means of communicating with the outside world, and how others were not so lucky. Including film from the helmet camera of skier Kristoffer Carlsson, who was buried alive under two metres of snow in Verbier, Switzerland, after triggering an avalanche

programme.title: Police Code Zero: Officer Under Attack
programme.desc: On Anglesey, PC Mark Lee fights for his life after a driver deliberately runs him down and leaves him for dead, while a Wiltshire officer tries to persuade a violent man to hand over his distressed baby. In Liverpool, a terrified officer issues an urgent call for help while hanging out of the passenger side of his own police car - the result of a criminal in handcuffs stealing trying to use it as a getaway vehicle

programme.desc: The second episode showing what could have happened to the gang members had their lives taken different paths. Carol and Ross decide to spice up their marriage, and Rachel catches Barry being unfaithful. Comedy, with David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Cameras capture a route through Spain, beginning near Leon, part of the famous north Spanish Pilgrimage, in the Picos de Europa mountains. The railway then runs through the Basque country before the famous Guggenheim Museum greets travellers in Bilbao. In Galicia, the gorges, coastline and sea bridges are a sight for sore eyes, and a speciality cider tour refreshes the train's guests. The journey ends in Ferrol, a spectacular harbour that has been a major shipbuilding centre for most of its history and has been a key city in many wars. Narrated by Bill Nighy

programme.title: The Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programme.desc: Dashcam footage of some of Britain's worst driving offenders, from suspected drug drivers and high-speed chases, to stolen vehicles and banned motorists. Officers from Cheshire Police follow a potentially dangerous driver, and in Warrington, cameras pick up a suspected stolen white van on the move. Elsewhere, an officer in Sandbach spots a suspicious young driver who bumps into a traffic island

programme.title: Inside Chernobyl with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: Over three decades after the world's most devastating nuclear accident, Ben Fogle spends a week living alone inside the Chernobyl exclusion zone. Throughout the expedition, Ben ventures inside the ruins of a nearby hospital, explores the deserted radioactive remains of the ghost town of Pripyat, and goes deep inside the Chernobyl nuclear power plant

A scientist learns the world is soon to face a global cataclysm that will wipe out the human race, but finds the US president has plans to secretly save a fraction of the population, leaving everyone else to die. A writer learns of this scheme, and as the world is devastated by earthquakes and volcanic eruptions, he tries to get his family to the last safe refuge. Disaster movie, with John Cusack and Chiwetel Ejiofor

programme.desc: Henry and Maggie attend wealthy businessman and Henry's friend David Weston's birthday party. During an enactment of a scene from the 18th century, a 'fake' gun kills one of David's four children. As the duo set out to determine what has happened, they also find themselves in the crosshairs of a bitter feud between heirs to a family fortune. Whodunit, starring Dylan Neal and Brooke Burns

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: The singer heads off to uncover the mysteries of the Mediterranean on an island-hopping tour of Greece. She begins by riding a Segway - a personal transportation vehicle - through the ancient streets of the capital Athens, before boarding her ship to start her aquatic adventure on the Mediterranean. With champagne-popping nights out in party capital Mykonos, and the stunning sunsets on the island of Santorini, this cruise offers the perfect combination of ancient Greek history and exciting modern landscapes

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours

programme.title: Home and Away

programme.title: The Highland Vet
programme.desc: Shondie and David work a busy night shift, during which the owner of a greyhound and a saluki-cross thinks one of them has swallowed a battery, which could disintegrate in the dog's stomach

programme.title: This Week on the Farm
programme.desc: Breeding season approaches for the sheep at Cannon Hall Farm in South Yorkshire, and the pressure is on for farming brothers Rob and Dave Nicholson to find the right ram for the job. JB Gill helps harvest some parsnips and Yorkshire Vet Julian Norton goes on a journey to produce a special cheese

programme.title: The Yorkshire Ripper's New Victims
programme.desc: Peter Sutcliffe, Britain's notorious serial killer, was convicted of 13 murders and seven attempted murders. Last November, he died in prison. But what dark secrets did he take to the grave? This documentary claims to draw on new evidence and testimony to reveal more victims before the official count, revealing that, contrary to the original police investigation, his attacks were carried out on men as well as women

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: The investigation into the death of Penny Beale in November 2001. Her boyfriend Michael Moffat claimed she fell down the stairs while drunk - but her mother knew better. To the police, Michael presented as a charming, helpful man who had been struggling to save his girlfriend from her alcohol and drug addictions. Penny's mother was aware of another side of him however - he was a drunk, abusive and violent man who was now trying to get away with her daughter's murder

programme.title: Fritzl: Surviving Evil
programme.desc: The case of the Austrian man Josef Fritzl, who kept his daughter prisoner for 24 years in the cellar of his house, until she was released in 2008 at the age of 42. Dramatically pleading guilty to all of the charges at the last moment of the trial, he was sentenced to life in a secure unit for incest, imprisonment, raping the victim - who bore seven children - and causing the death of one child by neglect

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross's girlfriend goes on a wild weekend away, leaving him to worry about what she is getting up to. Rachel longs for a date and Joey's fridge breaks down

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey auditions for a major TV show about a man and his crime-fighting robot, but Chandler almost ruins everything. Featuring clips from earlier episodes, starring Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter Wright tries to save the life of a cow whose uterus prolapsed while calving. Julian Norton goes head to head with a 300kg boar named Donald, who does not want to part with his dangerous tusks. Back at the practice, some of the team have an unenviable task when 13 ferrets are brought in

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Divine Designs
programme.desc: Paul Binski investigates the period after the Second World War, which saw the birth of a modern style of ecclesiastical architecture. He visits Coventry and Chichester cathedrals to highlight the contemporary designs

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice tackles a period property in Bow, in the heart of London's East End, hoping to attract potential buyers by clearing clutter and creating an elegant dining area. Among other improvements, she ditches a navy blue bathroom suite in favour of one in stylish white to ensure the house will fetch the asking price of £300,000

programme.title: The Cassandra Crossing (1976)
programme.desc: A fleeing terrorist infects transcontinental rail passengers with a deadly virus - prompting the authorities to consider re-routing the train across a dangerously unstable bridge, hoping it will collapse and kill everyone on board to prevent the contagion spreading. Disaster epic, starring Burt Lancaster, Richard Harris, Martin Sheen and Sophia Loren

programme.title: The Way to the Stars (1945)
programme.desc: A naive young pilot is assigned to a British bomber base during the Second World War, and is involved in the opening skirmishes of the Battle of Britain. He encounters the first wave of American recruits to the Allies, and falls for a local girl - but when his squadron leader is killed leaving a wife and child behind, he questions whether he can afford to marry. Drama, starring John Mills and Michael Redgrave

programme.title: Legend of the Lost (1957)
programme.desc: A grizzled adventurer living in Timbuktu is hired to escort a mysterious explorer across the Sahara desert in search of a fabled lost city. A local woman joins the men on their quest, but when the trio reach their destination the explorer reveals his plan to betray his companions and leave them high and dry. Adventure, starring John Wayne, Sophia Loren and Rossano Brazzi

programme.title: Bridge of Spies (2015)
programme.desc: A lawyer in 1950s New York is hired to represent a Soviet spy in a showcase trial designed to demonstrate the fairness of the US justice system. In the face of public condemnation, he argues against the death penalty, a stance that years later leads to his involvement in an exchange of prisoners in East Germany. Steven Spielberg's fact-based Cold War drama, starring Tom Hanks and an Oscar-winning Mark Rylance

programme.title: Unsane (2018)
programme.desc: A young woman is involuntarily committed to a psychiatric institute, where she is confronted by her greatest fear - but is it real or part of her delusion? Steven Soderbergh's horror, starring Claire Foy, Joshua Leonard and Jay Pharoah

programme.title: Dark River (2017)
programme.desc: After receiving news of her father's death, travelling sheep-shearer Alice tentatively decides to return to the dilapidated family house of her childhood in muddy North Yorkshire for the first time in 15 years, hoping to claim the tenancy to the family farm she believes is rightfully hers. Period drama, starring Ruth Wilson, Mark Stanley and Sean Bean

programme.title: American Honey (2016)
programme.desc: A poor teenager leaves home and hits the road with a crew of magazine sellers. She gets caught up in a whirlwind of hard partying, law bending and young love while crossing the Midwest United States. Drama, starring Sasha Lane, Shia LaBeouf and Riley Keough

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone (1958)
programme.desc: A drifter rides into a town dominated by the members of a ruthless family. He befriends a Mexican in jail for killing a man who attacked his sister and tries to save him from the gallows, getting caught up in the evil clan's running internal conflicts in the process. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Craig Stevens, Manuel Rojas and Barry Kelley

programme.title: Anastasia (1956)
programme.desc: In 1920s Paris, exiled Russians claim they have found the daughter of the last Tsar, who was originally believed to have been killed with the rest of her family. She is taken into the care of a General and groomed until she can convince Anastasia's cousin Prince Paul that she is genuinely the tsarina and inherit a fortune. Historical drama, starring an Oscar-winning Ingrid Bergman, and Yul Brynner

programme.title: Pony Express (1953)
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill Cody and Wild Bill Hickok work on establishing an east-west route for the pioneering mail service that will allow messages to be sent from Missouri to California in 10 days. However, they have to contend with saboteurs planning to prevent California becoming part of the Union. Western, starring Charlton Heston, Forrest Tucker, Rhonda Fleming and Jan Sterling

programme.title: Carry On Regardless (1961)
programme.desc: A businessman starts up an odd-job agency, but employs seven hopeless handymen incapable of completing any task without causing utter chaos. Matters come to a head when their landlord tries to evict them - forcing the bungling workmen to finally prove their worth. Slapstick comedy, starring Sid James, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams

programme.title: Charlotte Gray (2001)
programme.desc: An unassuming woman agrees to spy for the British during the Second World War and infiltrates occupied France, while embarking on a quest to locate her pilot lover, who has been shot down. Drama adapted from Sebastian Faulks' novel, starring Cate Blanchett, Billy Crudup, Rupert Penry-Jones and Michael Gambon

programme.title: Breaking In (2018)
programme.desc: After her father's murder, a woman travels to the home she grew up in with her two children, intending to settle her father's estate and sell the remote property. However, unbeknownst to the family, four criminals are already in the house, believing there is $4million inside a safe. Thriller, starring Gabrielle Union, Billy Burke and Richard Cabral

programme.title: Disturbia (2007)
programme.desc: A troubled teenager is sentenced to three months under house arrest for attacking a teacher, and passes the time by spying on his neighbours. However, one day he notices something suspicious and becomes convinced one of them is a serial killer. Thriller, starring Shia LaBeouf, Carrie-Anne Moss, David Morse and Sarah Roemer

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2011)
programme.desc: A Yorkshire hill farmer takes pity on a homeless boy, and brings him back to his remote estate on the moors. The new arrival and the farmer's daughter develop an obsessive bond as they grow up, but he is ultimately cast out by her brother. He returns years later, seeking to be reunited with his lost love and to avenge himself on her family. Period drama, starring James Howson and Kaya Scodelario

programme.title: A Day to Remember (1953)
programme.desc: The members of the darts team from the Hand & Flower pub in London head off on a day trip to Boulogne. Among the group is Jim, who is worried that his girlfriend plans to leave him, Shorty, a loner who hopes to join the Foreign Legion, the woman-chasing Charley, and Stan, an entrepreneur who wants to smuggle black-market watches back to the UK. Comedy, starring Stanley Holloway, Donald Sinden and Joan Rice

programme.title: Ride Lonesome (1959)
programme.desc: A bounty hunter captures young killer Billy John, but his real motive is not the cash reward - he has an old score to settle with his prisoner's brother Frank. As the journey to bring the murderer to justice gets under way, he is counting on a showdown with Frank and accepts the help of two outlaw gunmen for added protection, aware they will try to turn Billy John in themselves for the reward and a pardon. Western, with Randolph Scott, Lee Van Cleef, James Best, James Coburn and Pernell Roberts.

programme.title: Red Mountain (1951)
programme.desc: A Confederate captain sets out to join forces with notorious guerilla militia Quantrill's Raiders, but stops off en route to rescue a man from being lynched for a murder he himself committed - and complicates matters by falling for his fiancee. Western set during the American Civil War, starring Alan Ladd and Lizabeth Scott

programme.title: The Man Who Would Be King (1975)
programme.desc: Two British soldiers in 19th-century India travel to an unexplored land, where one of them fools the natives into believing he is a god. However, his growing delusions of grandeur put him at loggerheads with his comrade-in-arms. Adventure based on the Rudyard Kipling story, directed by John Huston, starring Sean Connery, Michael Caine, Saeed Jaffrey, Christopher Plummer and Shakira Caine

programme.title: Stargate (1994)
programme.desc: An Egyptologist and a soldier head an expedition through a mysterious portal to an alien planet. The world they find resembles ancient Egypt and is under the rule of a tyrant who has convinced the downtrodden inhabitants that he is a god - until the humans incite the enslaved populace to fight back. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kurt Russell, James Spader and Jaye Davidson

programme.title: Taken (2008)
programme.desc: An American teenager travelling through Europe is abducted by a gang of sex traffickers. However, what the kidnappers do not realise is that the girl's father is a former CIA agent, who employs all his old skills as he searches for the criminals and tries to rescue his daughter. Thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Famke Janssen and Maggie Grace

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes (2017)
programme.desc: Women's tennis champion Billie Jean King takes up the challenge to face former men's champ Bobby Riggs on the court, and disprove his claims that the women's game is an inferior sport. As the match develops into a media circus, both players face problems of their own, as King comes to terms with her sexuality and Riggs battles his gambling addiction. Fact-based comedy drama, starring Emma Stone and Steve Carell

programme.title: Men, Women & Children (2014)
programme.desc: Four teenagers and their parents struggle to deal with the complicated ways in which modern technology has affected their lives and how they communicate. Issues such as celebrity, pornography and eating disorders put all their relationships to the test. Ensemble drama, starring Adam Sandler and Jennifer Garner

programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago investigate a difficult 'he said, she said' case. Captain Holt becomes suspicious that a cunning escape from jail has taken place after discovering that his lifelong criminal arch-nemesis has died in a prison transport accident

programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt investigates an intriguing claim about tomato ketchup bottles, Kate Quilton discovers how oysters turned from a Victorian bar snack to a wallet-busting luxury, and Amanda Byram uncovers the difference between medium and large eggs

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp is taught how to bind books by expert Isabelle Ting, and reveals how to create a notebook from leftover materials including leather offcuts, recycled leather coats and decorative paper

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Russell Lovatt from Nottingham has been visiting Malta for the last 40 years. Now, with help from his daughter Sian, he is looking for the perfect property for a complete relocation, but they have very different opinions about what sort of home Russell should buy. With a budget of £200,000, can Laura Hamilton find a property with the wow factor to impress them both?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole gives Simon O'Brien a motorcycling masterclass in Wiltshire as the duo seek more items to fix up and sell on to make profits for their owners

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit the Cotswolds and Somerset, where finds include a set of milk churns and an old munitions shell

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick gets to work on the walled garden in the spring and buys a mini tractor for the job - but it may not fit through the gate. Angel designs another suite, with black walls and mosaic mirrors, and decorates the entire dining room with blossoms so a guest can make a special wedding proposal. The couple also consider the possibility of truffle farming

programme.title: Test Cricket Highlights
programme.desc: India v England. Rishi Persad presents action from day one of the series-concluding Fourth Test, held at Sardar Patel Stadium in Ahmedabad

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Tynemouth 61 in Tyne and Wear, where owner Stephen Minns taking his guests to an indoor climbing wall in his attempt to impress them

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the Black Horse Inn in Kirkby Fleetham, North Yorkshire, where manager Steve Barker and bar manager Callum Dixon believe they can win their guests over

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit of the week the group head to The Shores Hotel in Blackpool, where guests Lottie and Lil are surprised by the view from their window

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lottie and Lil Ellis try to convince the contestants that glamping is glamorous at Hilltop Hideaways in Royal Leamington Spa - only for one guest to reveal she will not be staying

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. Tynemouth 61 is first and host Stephen Minns wants Enid and Nathanael to dish the dirt on their comments about cleanliness

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo and Simon O'Brien are in Woking, where they find a sidecar to be transformed into a boat and a water cylinder that Simon might make a trendy lamp

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Tortoises Burt and Terrance become rivals in love when they pursue a breeding female. Meanwhile, six-year-old okapi K'Tusha nears the end of her first pregnancy, and keepers hope that her baby will help to conserve this highly-endangered species, and Asian elephant bull Aung-Bo senses that the three-day window for mating is about to begin

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel look ahead to wedding season, with eight couples booking the chateau for their big day. Dick also converts a stone barn into a flat for Angel's parents, getting rid of 150 years' worth of rubbish in the process, but tensions rise between the couple when he gets carried away with the trees at the front of the property

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows interior designer Kathryn Tyler as she tries to create a Scandinavian-style eco house in her mother's back garden in Falmouth, Cornwall, close by the Lizard Peninsula. The plan is ambitious, featuring a white-painted brick ground floor, a lightweight timber-frame first floor and cleverly designed spaces, but the small size of the plot and Kathryn's inexperience could hamper the project

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: Greg and Helen Watson have bought a home in one of the most expensive areas of Sheffield, South Yorkshire, but it's too cramped for their needs and needs renovating. What's more, their third child is due in 18 weeks and they are desperate to move in before then. Architects Howard Evans and Prue Chiles are given the job, but with the Covid-19 lockdown, the wettest month on record and some major design differences, the build is in danger of collapsing before their £120,000 budget runs out

programme.title: The Tudors
programme.desc: Catherine of Aragon's nephew Charles V visits King Henry, while the royal also comes face to face with Anne Boleyn for the first time. Cardinal Wolsey meets envoys from the Holy Roman Empire to discuss a treaty between the two powers. However, tensions mount when the King of France hears news of their plans

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the treatment of sport enthusiasts who have had accidents on two wheels. Billy, 19, has been thrown 20ft from his motocross bike during a race, suffering multiple spinal injuries. Teacher Dave, 53, has facial injuries after riding his new bicycle into the back of a stationary car in Richmond Park, while 30-year-old adrenaline junkie and former Royal Marine Richard has badly dislocated his thumb after falling off a bike

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts another round of light-hearted words-and-numbers fun, with Sean Lock and Katherine Ryan taking on Jon Richardson and David Mitchell. Nick Helm is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, while Rachel Riley does the adding up

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: An inmate comes in with an entirely preventable illness, so Max, Sharpe and Iggy head directly to the source - Rikers Island. Bloom struggles with her recovery and Reynolds gets news that could change his life

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

At a Norwegian scallop farm, Matt Tebbutt braves the icy waters of the North Sea to join the divers harvesting scallops by hand from the seabed, and Kate Quilton tries to unravel a mystery about Cornwall's most famous local delicacy

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Presenters Jeremy Clarkson, James May and Richard Hammond tackle the traffic chaos snowy weather causes in Britain, and hit upon a solution involving a combine harvester, some rudimentary engineering skills and a trip to Norway. Jeremy also tests the Audi RS5 and the BMW M3, and American actress and model Amber Heard is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef heads to the north-eastern Greek city of Thessaloniki, which nestles on the northern shores of the Aegean Sea. The city is revered as the gourmet capital of Greece and birthplace to possibly the greatest warrior general that ever lived - Alexander. Rick explores a city of many identities, boasting a young student population apparently hungry for dishes that reflect the freshest of seafood. Back home, he prepares veal and aubergine stew after meeting the doyenne of Greek cooking, Vafa Alexiadou

programme.desc: In an episode originally shown in 2011, Jeremy Clarkson celebrates the 50th anniversary of the Jaguar E-type by driving a modern-day interpretation of the classic sports car, and throws a typically low-key party involving live music, fighter planes and the Royal Marines. Richard Hammond is in South Africa, where he tests the Marauder, a bigger, more rugged alternative to the Humvee, and James May enlists the help of 2010 Winter Olympic skeleton gold medallist Amy Williams and former Intercontinental Rally Challenge champion Kris Meeke to try out a Mini rally car. programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef visits Palermo in northern Sicily, a city echoing Arab, North African, French, Spanish and Italian influences, making its cuisine unique and irresistible. Pine nuts, raisins, almonds and golden breadcrumbs are combined with flavours of sun-ripened tomatoes, lemons and the finest olive oil to create a range of unforgettable dishes. Rick witnesses locals celebrating a festival in honour of Palermo's patron saint Rosalia, and receives a cookery lesson from a real-life duchess. At home he cooks Marsala chicken, a Sicilian classic served in UK bistros since the 1960s

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: Cheltenham Spa station manager Richard Morrish braces himself for a hectic four days with the two-platform station used by more than 60,000 horse racing fans during the Cheltenham Festival. Just as the mainline at Dawlish is about to be reopened after being washed away in the winter storms, a crack is discovered in the sandstone cliffs two miles down the line and a landslide threatens to engulf the tracks. Conductor Jameil and driver Gary have to react quickly on the Reading to Gatwick service when a pedestrian takes a perilous short cut

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: As the deadline approaches for the reopening of the mainline at Dawlish, a 300-strong army of engineers works 24 hours a day to keep to the timetable. At London's Paddington station, a train with a Pullman silver service dining car is being prepared, with the onboard team pulling out all the stops to impress food writer Regula Ysewijn, who is researching an article. Elsewhere, North Cotswolds station manager Theresa - known as the 'smiling tiger' for the way she runs her stations firmly and with great care and dedication - keeps a watchful eye on the line between Oxford and Hereford, which carries the highest proportion of first-class ticket holders on the network

programme.title: History Hunters
programme.desc: A fascinating find from Normandy is brought into the shop. And Steve and Marie head to Oxford University to delve into the story behind a war hero's beautiful childhood scrapbook

programme.title: World's Greatest Palaces
programme.desc: The Royal Palace of Caserta near Naples, Italy, which was created by Luigi Vanvitelli and houses a silk factory that dates back to the 18th century and still functions to this day

programme.title: World's Greatest Palaces
programme.desc: Kensington Palace in London, which began life as an early 17th-century Jacobean mansion before becoming a palace fit for the monarchy, and was the brainchild of Christopher Wren

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On the final leg of his journey, Michael Portillo rediscovers a once-famous poet in Nottingham and travels on a railway line resurrected by popular demand after falling victim to Beeching's cuts. He finds out how Doncaster rail workers shaped British political history, before reaching his final destination of Leeds, where he auditions at Britain's oldest continuously working music hall

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the first leg of a journey from Southampton to Wolverhampton, beginning by being taught how to set a table aboard the luxury liner Queen Elizabeth. In the village of Netley he finds the remains of an extensive military hospital built by order of Queen Victoria, and ends his travels in Basingstoke, where he learns out about a pitched battle between townspeople and the Salvation Army

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents a Christmas special from Lyme Park in Cheshire, where she and toy expert Will Farmer look back at children's Christmas presents dating back to Edwardian times. In the house's gardens, over 2000 visitors have arrived to have their items valued, including many with a royal heritage. The programme features a cup and saucer once owned by the Queen, a pram from Buckingham Palace, and a dagger believed to have been owned by Charles I. Plus, a celebration of the works of Charles Dickens

programme.title: Impossible Railways
programme.desc: Unusual rail networks designed to traverse water, including the Indian Ocean, the earthquake zones of the Bosphorus Strait and the sea cliffs of the Italian Riviera

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A rare Honda S800 sports car from 1967 takes Derek's fancy, and a couple of very different Ford Capris with long histories go head-to-head at the auction

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An Albanian village home to Allied secret agents, devastated for resisting the Nazi war machine, and a notorious asylum in America that enforced lobotomies

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: How Russian scientists tried to create a human-ape hybrid in the 1920s. Plus, a mysterious airship crash and a disease outbreak that may have been caused by bio-weapon experiments

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: How, in 1940, the French Army suffered a heavy defeat after underestimating the Nazis' strength while relying on First World War strategies and equipment to defend its frontiers. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents a Christmas special from Lyme Park in Cheshire, where she and toy expert Will Farmer look back at children's Christmas presents dating back to Edwardian times.
